bodyHtml:
Haoleme is making waves in the Backend ecosystem this week, gaining 13new stars. With a total of 13 stars on GitHub and 0 forks, this open-source project is rapidly becoming a go-to tool for developers worldwide.

⭐ 13Stars
📈 +13/wkGrowth
🔀 0Forks
⚠️ 0Open Issues

Key Features

  • Written in Java for maximum performance
  • Licensed under AGPL-3.0 — free to use and modify
  • Official website: https://pypi.org/project/haoleme/
  • 🏷️ android
  • 🏷️ cli
  • 🏷️ command-monitor
  • 🏷️ python
  • 🏷️ remote-monitoring

Why Haoleme Is Trending

The Backend landscape is constantly evolving, and Haoleme has emerged as one of the fastest-growing projects this week. Several factors contribute to its momentum:

  1. Growing community: With 13 new stars this week alone, developer adoption is accelerating rapidly.
  2. Active maintenance: The project sees regular updates, ensuring compatibility with the latest ecosystem changes.
  3. Practical utility: 在手机上监控电脑和服务器里的命令运行状态。用 hao 启动命令，App 实时查看输出、设备状态和结束通知。

If you're working in Backend, this is definitely a project worth watching — and adopting.

Quick Start

Get started with Haoleme in minutes:

# Clone the repository git clone https://github.com/HaolemeApp/Haoleme # Navigate to project cd Haoleme # Check the README for detailed setup instructions

For full documentation and advanced usage, visit the official GitHub repository.

Final Thoughts

Haoleme is a solid addition to any developer's toolkit. With its growing community, active development, and practical design, it's well worth your time to evaluate. Star it on GitHub, try it in a side project, and see if it fits your workflow.
